title: Portuguese Almond Cookies
description: A simple and traditional Portuguese dessert made with almonds, perfect for a sweet treat. These cookies are crunchy on the outside and chewy on the inside.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together flour, yeast, and 1/4 teaspoon salt.
Add in sliced almonds and mix until well combined.
Roll out dough to about 1/4 inch thickness. Cut into desired shapes using a cookie cutter.
Place cookies on prepared baking sheet, leaving about 1 inch of space between each cookie.
Bake for 18-20 minutes or until edges are lightly golden.
Remove from oven and let cool on baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Dust with powdered sugar before serving.
